subject: RE: Q3 planning meeting
body: Hi team, we need to finalize the Q3 roadmap by Friday. Alice, can you draft the engineering timeline? Bob, please review the feature request doc. Thanks!

subject: Production hotfix needed
body: The payment gateway integration is timing out for 10% of users. This needs immediate attention — can someone from the backend team investigate?

subject: Code review request: auth module
body: I've pushed the auth module changes to branch 'feature/auth-v2'. Could someone review the PR by EOD? It blocks the dashboard work.
